---
title: "Slow Sliding"
author: "Connor Flynn"
date: "2024-11-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(tigris)
library(tidycensus)
library(mapview)
library(sf)

```

```{r}

# Load data
lang_data <- read_csv(here("LangAppData.csv")) %>%
  mutate(ST_label = sub("/.*", "", ST_label))  # Modify ST_label

# Group and calculate percentages
lang_data_all_state <- lang_data %>%
  group_by(LANP_label, ST_label) %>%
  summarise(total_speakers = sum(n)) %>%
  group_by(LANP_label) %>%
  mutate(percent_speakers = (total_speakers / sum(total_speakers)) * 100)

# Load state geometries
states_sf <- states(cb = TRUE)

# Join spatial and language data
lang_data_all_state <- lang_data_all_state %>%
  rename(NAME = ST_label)

joined_data <- states_sf %>%
  left_join(lang_data_all_state, by = "NAME")

# Get state populations
state_pops <- get_estimates(geography = "state", product = "population",
                            geometry = TRUE, year = 2022) %>%
  filter(variable == "POPESTIMATE")

lang_data <- lang_data %>%
  rename(NAME = ST_label)

# Join with population data
lang_data_state_pops <- full_join(lang_data, state_pops, by = "NAME")

# Calculate speakers per state
lang_data_by_state <- lang_data_state_pops %>%
  group_by(LANP_label, NAME, value, geometry) %>%
  summarise(total_speakers = sum(n) / value) %>%
  distinct()

```


```{r}
# Shiny app
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Dynamic Language Mapping"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput("language", "Select a Language:", 
                  choices = unique(lang_data$LANP_label), 
                  selected = "Spanish")
    ),
    mainPanel(
      leafletOutput("combined_map")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  reactive_data <- reactive({
    selected_language <- input$language

    map1_data <- joined_data %>% filter(LANP_label == selected_language)
    map2_data <- lang_data_by_state %>% filter(LANP_label == selected_language) %>% st_as_sf()

    map1 <- mapview(map1_data, zcol = "percent_speakers",
                    layer.name = "Percentage of Speakers",
                    col.regions = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Blues"),
                    na.color = "grey")
    
    map2 <- mapview(map2_data, zcol = "total_speakers",
                    layer.name = "Speakers per Capita",
                    col.regions = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Greens"),
                    na.color = "grey")
    
    map1 | map2
  })
  
  output$combined_map <- renderLeaflet({
    reactive_data()@map
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```


Improving Speed

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(tigris)
library(tidycensus)
library(mapview)
library(sf)
library(rmapshaper)  # For geometry simplification
library(leaflet)
# Function to dynamically generate color palettes
generate_palette <- function(n, palette_name = "Blues") {
  colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, palette_name))(n)
}

# Load and preprocess data
lang_data <- read_csv(here("LangAppData.csv")) %>%
  mutate(ST_label = sub("/.*", "", ST_label))

# Group and calculate percentages
lang_data_all_state <- lang_data %>%
  group_by(LANP_label, ST_label) %>%
  summarise(total_speakers = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(LANP_label) %>%
 mutate(percent_speakers = round((total_speakers / sum(total_speakers)) * 100, 0))


# Load and simplify state geometries
states_sf <- states(cb = TRUE) %>%
  ms_simplify(keep = 0.05)  # Simplify geometries to 5% of points

# Join spatial and language data
lang_data_all_state <- lang_data_all_state %>%
  rename(NAME = ST_label)

joined_data <- states_sf %>%
  left_join(lang_data_all_state, by = "NAME")

# Get state populations with simplified geometry
state_pops <- get_estimates(geography = "state", product = "population",
                            geometry = TRUE, vintage = 2022) %>%
  filter(variable == "POPESTIMATE") %>%
  ms_simplify(keep = 0.05)

lang_data <- lang_data %>%
  rename(NAME = ST_label)

# Join with population data
lang_data_state_pops <- full_join(lang_data, state_pops, by = "NAME")

# Calculate speakers per state
lang_data_by_state <- lang_data_state_pops %>%
  group_by(LANP_label, NAME, value, geometry) %>%
  summarise(total_speakers_per_100k = round((sum(n) / value) * 100000, 0)) %>%
  st_as_sf()

# Shiny app
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Dynamic Language Mapping"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput("language", "Select a Language:", 
                  choices = unique(lang_data$LANP_label), 
                  selected = "Spanish")
    ),
    mainPanel(
      leafletOutput("combined_map")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  reactive_data <- reactive({
    selected_language <- input$language

    # Filter for selected language
    map1_data <- joined_data %>% filter(LANP_label == selected_language) 
    map1_data <- map1_data %>%
  mutate(percent_speakers_tooltip = paste0(percent_speakers, "%"))
    map1_data <- map1_data %>%
  mutate(
    percent_speakers_formatted = paste0(percent_speakers, "%")  # Add % for hover
  )
    map1_data <- map1_data %>%
  mutate(
    percent_speakers_label = paste0(percent_speakers, "%")  # Formatted for hover
  )
    
    
    map2_data <- lang_data_by_state %>% filter(LANP_label == selected_language)
    map2_data <- map2_data %>%
  mutate(total_speakers_per_100k_tooltip = paste0(total_speakers_per_100k, " 👤"))
    map2_data <- map2_data %>%
  mutate(
    total_speakers_per_100k_formatted = paste0(total_speakers_per_100k, " 👤")  # Add emoji for hover
  )
    map2_data <- map2_data %>%
  mutate(
    total_speakers_per_100k_label = paste0(total_speakers_per_100k, " per 100,000 👤")  # Formatted for hover
  )

    # Render maps with simplified data
map1 <- mapview(
  map1_data,
  zcol = "percent_speakers",  # Numeric column for color mapping
  layer.name = "Percentage of Language Speakers<br>Living in State",
  col.regions = generate_palette(9, "Blues"),
  na.color = "grey",
  label = map1_data$percent_speakers_label,  # Hover tooltip with %
  popup = paste0("Percentage of Speakers: ", map1_data$percent_speakers_label)  # Click popup with %
)





map2 <- mapview(
  map2_data,
  zcol = "total_speakers_per_100k",  # Numeric column for color mapping
  layer.name = "Speakers per 100,000 Population",
  col.regions = generate_palette(9, "Greens"),
  na.color = "grey",
  label = map2_data$total_speakers_per_100k_label,  # Hover tooltip with 👤
  popup = paste0("Speakers: ", map2_data$total_speakers_per_100k_label)  # Click popup with 👤
)



    map1 | map2
  })

  output$combined_map <- renderLeaflet({
    reactive_data()@map
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)


```
